name: chiqq
description: Bulk load your async tasks to queue them with concurrency control and retry logic
author: Mathias Wulff

scripts.build: bun -e 'await Bun.$`rm -rf dist types && mkdir dist types`' && bun run build-js && bun run build-types
scripts.build-js: bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/chiqq.js --format esm && bun -e 'await Bun.$`sed -i "" "s/  /	/g" dist/chiqq.js`'
scripts.#postversion: npm publish && git push && git push --tags && echo "Successfully released version $npm_package_version"
